name: 16oz Stoneware Best Person Ever Color Splash Mug - Threshold™
description: From morning cup of coffee to your evening cup of tea, enjoy your favorite drink with this 16-Ounce Stoneware Best Person Ever Mug from Threshold™. Made from heavy duty stoneware for lasting use, this mug features "Best Person Ever" text on the side with color splash detailing on the inside that adds charm and flair to your favorite drinks. Both dishwasher- and microwave-safe, it's extremely easy to care for and fill with any hot or cold beverage. Keep your kitchen cohesive and pair them with the coordinating dishware to create the perfect tablescape.
